title: Synchrony Financial 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary source for Synchrony's business description, sales platforms, 2025 purchase volume, receivables, active accounts, deposits, net interest income, and net earnings.

title: Business Financing Options - Synchrony
note: Product source for retail credit cards, network cards, Pay Later loans, secured installment loans, and merchant-partner positioning.

title: Health and Wellness Credit Card - CareCredit
note: Product source for CareCredit financing, provider-location scale, eligible care categories, and promotional financing positioning.

title: Synchrony Financial (SYF) - Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for Synchrony's June 2026 market capitalization and share-price context.

title: Synchrony Financial (SYF) - P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for Synchrony's June 2026 trailing price-to-earnings ratio.

title: Apache Fineract
note: Open-source core banking and loan-servicing enabler for decentralized or cooperative consumer-finance implementations.

title: GNU Taler
publisher: GNUnet e.V. and Taler Systems SA
note: Free-software payment-system source used as an open checkout and merchant-payment alternative/enabler.

title: Open Payments
note: Technical-docs source for an open API standard for interoperable payment setup and completion.

title: Mifos X Platform and Web App
note: Open-source financial-inclusion platform source used for cooperative and community patient-financing alternatives.

title: Medical Credit Cards and Financing Plans
note: Analysis source documenting consumer risks and market structure concerns around medical credit cards and healthcare installment financing.
